title: [InstCombine] Fold `(X * (Y << K)) u>> K -> X * Y` when highbits are not demanded

tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-n8:16:32:64"

define <4 x i16> @vector_mul_lshr_i16(<4 x i16> %x) {
entry:
  %mul = mul <4 x i16> %x, <i16 64, i16 64, i16 64, i16 64>
  %shift = lshr <4 x i16> %mul, <i16 6, i16 6, i16 6, i16 6>
  ret <4 x i16> %shift
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on scalar i32/i64 operations; this test uses vector types (<4 x i16>) which are not mentioned in the summary but are handled by the same pattern matching logic

alive2.src:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-n8:16:32:64"

define <4 x i16> @vector_mul_lshr_i16(<4 x i16> %x) {
entry:
  %mul = mul <4 x i16> %x, <i16 64, i16 64, i16 64, i16 64>
  %shift = lshr <4 x i16> %mul, <i16 6, i16 6, i16 6, i16 6>
  ret <4 x i16> %shift
}
alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-n8:16:32:64"

define <4 x i16> @vector_mul_lshr_i16(<4 x i16> %x) {
entry:

  ret <4 x i16> %mul
}

tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-n8:16:32:64"

define i128 @i128_mul_lshr_exact_boundary(i128 %x) {
entry:
  %mul = mul i128 %x, 4096
  %shift = lshr i128 %mul, 12
  ret i128 %shift
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary examples use i32/i64; this tests i128 width with exact boundary condition where countr_zero() equals ShiftAmt (12 trailing zeros, shift by 12)

tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-n8:16:32:64"

define i32 @i8_mul_lshr_with_sext_chain(i8 %x) {
entry:
  %ext = sext i8 %x to i32
  %mul = mul i32 %ext, 32
  %shift = lshr i32 %mul, 5
  ret i32 %shift
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-n8:16:32:64"

define i32 @i8_mul_lshr_with_sext_chain(i8 %x) {
entry:
  %ext = sext i8 %x to i32
  %mul = mul i32 %ext, 1
  ret i32 %mul
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions zext from i1 but doesn't cover sext chains from i8 to i32 before the mul-lshr pattern; the optimization still applies to the mul-lshr portion

alive2.src:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-n8:16:32:64"

define i32 @i8_mul_lshr_with_sext_chain(i8 %x) {
entry:
  %ext = sext i8 %x to i32
  %mul = mul i32 %ext, 32
  %shift = lshr i32 %mul, 5
  ret i32 %shift
}
